description: Scideas Software is a custom software company whose public service endpoints include hosted utilities for HTML-to-PDF conversion and regression-analysis processing. These services are presented under services.scideas.net with product pages and OpenAPI descriptions.
summary: scideas.net exposes two documented HTTP APIs on services.scideas.net: Perfectpdf for HTML-to-PDF conversion and Regression for regression-analysis data processing, both authenticated with a service-issued API key sent in the JSON request body.
